name: ramp
description: Ramp skills and MCP server for vendor spend analysis and finance workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze vendor spend and Ramp finance data
interface.longDescription: Use Ramp's MCP-backed skills to analyze vendor spend, enrich vendor ownership data, and answer finance workflow questions directly from Ramp data.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Ramp to analyze vendor spend, identify top vendors, and summarize ownership and renewal risk
